[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110101 6
1 10010011 4
2 01011001 4
3 11001110 5
4 00000010 1
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a

12 00110111 5
23 10000000 1
34 00001000 1
45 00000100 1
56 00100010 2
67 00000000 a
70 10000001 2

71 01000000 1
